Fuel Consumption Calculator

Calculate your vehicle's fuel consumption and cost per trip. Enter distance traveled and fuel used.

FAQ

How is fuel consumption calculated?

Fuel consumption (L/100km) = (Fuel used in liters / Distance in km) × 100. MPG = Distance in miles / Gallons used.

What is good fuel economy?

For cars: under 6 L/100km (over 40 MPG) is excellent, 6-8 L/100km (30-40 MPG) is good, over 10 L/100km (under 24 MPG) is poor.

How to convert MPG to L/100km?

L/100km = 235.215 / MPG. For example, 30 MPG = 235.215/30 = 7.84 L/100km.
